extension.description: Support for the Senior Programming Language
lsp.configuration.title: LSP
lsp.configuration.contexts.description: Defines independent validation contexts for the compiler.
lsp.configuration.contexts.item.name.des: Context name (for identification in logs and diagnostics).
lsp.configuration.contexts.item.filePatt: Glob (e.g. HR*.txt) or regex prefixed with re: (e.g. re:^[0-9].*\\.txt$).
lsp.configuration.contexts.item.includeS: Whether to include subdirectories under the root directory.
lsp.configuration.contexts.item.system.e: Only HCM features and those common to all systems.
Only RONDA SENIOR features and those common to all systems.
Only ERP features and those common to all systems.
lsp.configuration.contexts.item.diagnost: Diagnostic IDs ignored only inside this context. Not used in SingleFile mode.
List of diagnostic IDs to ignore during validation (e.g. LSP1001).
lsp.configuration.format.indentSize.desc: Number of spaces per indentation level.
lsp.configuration.format.useTabs.descrip: Use tabs for indentation instead of spaces.
lsp.configuration.format.maxParamsPerLin: Maximum number of function parameters per line before breaking signatures.
lsp.configuration.format.embeddedSql.ena: Enables dedicated formatting for embedded SQL only in recognized safe contexts such as ExecSql, Cursor.SQL, ExecSQLEx and SQL_DefinirComando.
lsp.configuration.format.embeddedSql.dia: SQL dialect used by embedded SQL formatting. Supported values: generic SQL, Oracle and SQL Server.
lsp.configuration.semantic.embeddedSqlHi: Enables lightweight semantic highlighting for recognized embedded SQL strings independently from embedded SQL formatting.
lsp.configuration.refactor.defaultBlockS: Default block style used by native refactor code actions.
lsp.configuration.fallback.defaultSystem: Default additional system when a file is outside any context.
lsp.command.fallback.selectSystem.title: Select Fallback System
lsp.command.contexts.create.title: Create Context
lsp.command.contexts.edit.title: Edit Context
lsp.command.contexts.delete.title: Delete Context
lsp.command.contexts.validate.title: Validate Contexts
lsp.command.contexts.openSettings.title: Open Context Settings
lsp.command.diagnostics.ignoreId.title: Ignore Diagnostic ID
lsp.command.diagnostics.unignoreId.title: Stop Ignoring Diagnostic ID
lsp.command.quickfix.applyEditPlan.title: Apply Quick Fix Edit Plan
lsp.configuration.debug.enabled.descript: Enables debug mode: metrics + observability logs to file (JSONL).
lsp.configuration.debug.path.description: Folder path to store debug files (relative to workspace allowed).
